title: Visual Designer

Matches your job preferences, workplace type is On-site.
description:
About the job
VISUAL DESIGNER 
Location: Sydney, NSW (On-site)
Type: CASUAL

Disrupt is a business solutions provider offering Business Transformation, Marketing Services and Technology Solutions for SMEs to ASX 100 companies. Our proprietary problem-solving 3D model – Discover, Design, Deliver – produces unforgettable experiences for brands, businesses, and organisations, always starting from a strategic approach.

Founded in 2016, Disrupt is recognised for innovation, creative vision, timely delivery, and seamless execution. Our Disruptors - fearless individuals with award-winning credentials, limitless ideas, and extensive experience - promise to create experiences that disrupt the norm, inspire action, yield results, and drive ROI.

The Role
As a Visual Designer at Disrupt, you aren't just making things look "pretty." You are a visual strategist. Based in our Sydney office, you will be responsible for translating complex business transformations and marketing strategies into high-impact visual narratives.

You will work across the entire spectrum of our Discover, Design, Deliver model, ensuring that every touchpoint - whether it’s a digital interface for a tech solution or a brand identity for an ASX 100 company - is executed with precision and a "disruptive" edge.

What You’ll Do
Design & Ideate: Create world-class visual assets across digital, print, and motion that align with client business goals.
Strategic Execution: Work alongside our business transformation and tech teams to ensure visual concepts are grounded in the "Discover" phase and technically viable for "Delivery."
Brand Stewardship: Maintain and evolve the visual identities of our diverse client portfolio, ensuring consistency and innovation.
Collaborate: Present ideas to stakeholders and explain design choices with customer logic and creative intuition.
Drive ROI: Produce designs that drive user action and tangible results for our clients.

Who You Are
Adobe Power User: You possess Intermediate to Advanced proficiency in the Adobe Creative Suite (specifically Photoshop, Illustrator, and InDesign). You know the shortcuts, the workflows, and how to push these tools to their limits.
A Seasoned Creative: You have 4+ years of experience in a fast-paced agency or high-growth environment.
Strategic Mindset: You understand that design is a problem-solving tool. You ask "Why?" before you ask "What color?"
Sydney-Based: You thrive in a collaborative office environment and are ready to plug into our Sydney-based culture of innovation.
Multi-Disciplinary: Experience with Figma is a must; motion graphics (After Effects) or 3D design skills are a massive plus.

Why Disrupt?
Work with the Best: Join a team of "Disruptors" who are industry leaders in their respective fields.
Culture: We value fearless thinking and seamless execution. No ego, just results.
Growth: We invest in our people’s "limitless ideas"

Apply Now
Ready to disrupt the norm? Please submit your portfolio and CV. We want to see how you turn a strategic brief into an unforgettable experience.
